title: Exothostemon paludosus
taxonomy: Exothostemon paludosus is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae. It is native to Western Australia. The plant is classified within the genus Exothostemon, which is a part of the citrus family Rutaceae. Further classification includes it as belonging to the order Sapindales. It is a rare and unique species.
